case_title: JOSE HUIZAR VS. JOHN POLLARD et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUIZAR, JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLLARD, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA 5.12 CONSTRUCTION; 5.12 CONSTRUCTION, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION; JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY $5,120.63 PRINCIPAL, $19.00 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,259.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
